evals.prompt: I want to audit my skill library for overlap. Can you check if any of my skills are redundant or competing for the same triggers? The skills are in /Volumes/Trebleet/DevProjects/bb-ai-sdlc/
evals.expected_output: Should run the scan script, identify top overlapping pairs, check cross-references, and produce a structured overlap analysis report

assertions.text: Runs the scan_skills.py script or manually inventories all skills in the library
Identifies at least 3 pairs of skills with overlapping descriptions or shared territory
Checks cross-references for broken links and finds the dev-testing-live-aws broken references
Produces a structured report with severity levels (critical, warning, info)
Provides actionable recommendations for resolving the highest-priority overlaps

evals.prompt: Does infra-cdk-quality overlap with any of our other skills? I want to make sure it's not duplicating what dev-detecting-antipatterns or dev-creating-deploy-scripts already cover.
evals.expected_output: Should do a targeted analysis of infra-cdk-quality against those two skills specifically, identifying shared territory and boundary clarity

assertions.text: Reads infra-cdk-quality SKILL.md and the two comparison skills
Identifies specific overlap areas between infra-cdk-quality and dev-detecting-antipatterns (both scan for patterns/anti-patterns)
Identifies specific overlap areas between infra-cdk-quality and dev-creating-deploy-scripts (both cover deployment scripts)
Assesses whether boundaries are clear, implicit, or confused for each pair
Recommends specific actions like adding exclusions or cross-references to clarify boundaries

evals.prompt: We just retired the dev-testing-live-aws skill and redistributed its content. Can you check if any skills still reference it and need to be updated?
evals.expected_output: Should scan for broken cross-references to dev-testing-live-aws and identify which skills need updating

assertions.text: Scans all skills for references to dev-testing-live-aws
Identifies infra-cdk-quality and implementing-features as having broken references
Suggests specific replacement references or actions for each broken link
Checks if the redistributed content created any new overlaps with receiving skills
